Email.Subject: INTERMEX - Accounting Invoice
Email.Body:
Dear Agent,

Please find attached your daily invoice. Should you have any questions please contact our Accounts Receivable Department at 1(877)256-0390. We kindly ask you to send your Deposit Receipt confirmation by e-mail, fax or text message:


E-mail: Dep@intermexusa.com


Fax number: 1(800)388-5651


Text Message: (305)632-8767



Note: **Please send all Deposit Receipts by e-mail or text message. Please indicate the Agency Code to confirm where the receipt is coming from.



Have a nice day!



Intermex Wire Transfer



*** This is an automatically generated email, please do not reply ***
